steps.title: Clear the decimals
steps.content: Multiply the first equation by $10$: $$-8y=7x+24,$$ so $$7x+8y=-24.$$ Rewrite the second equation as $$2x+3y=21.$$

steps.title: Eliminate y
steps.content: Multiply $7x+8y=-24$ by $3$ to get $$21x+24y=-72.$$ Multiply $2x+3y=21$ by $8$ to get $$16x+24y=168.$$ Subtract the second equation from the first: $$5x=-240.$$
